en: Status: [INNOVATION] Initialized evolver GEP pipeline for pajama-hive with innovate strategy. Created Gene definitions for repair and optimize patterns. Registered asset store with candidates.jsonl tracking evolution signals.
zh: 状态: [创新] 为 pajama-hive 初始化了 evolver GEP 管线，使用创新策略。创建了修复和优化模式的 Gene 定义。注册了 candidates.jsonl 追踪演化信号的资产存储。
